creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
When specifiying the "PreferredMode" keyword in the monitor section of
xorg.conf, the server enters an infinite loop.

Fix: The following patch has been obtained from Mandriva Linux, and
fixes the issue:
How-To-Repeat: 
Add
        Option      "PreferredMode" "1280x1024"
to xorg.conf.
